title: cyanea lanceolata
intro: Cyanea lanceolata, also known as Hawaiian lobelia, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands, belonging to the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Cyanea lanceolata include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing. Cyanea lanceolata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
